project.name: ads-decision-service
project.description: ADS decision service that consumes the external library to access decision metadata

arguments.argument:
# Check if this is the parent module (ads-decision-service) MODULE_NAME=$(basename "${project.basedir}")
# Skip execution in the parent module if [ "$MODULE_NAME" = "ads-decision-service" ]; then echo "Skipping metadata generation in parent module" exit 0 fi
# Create output directory mkdir -p "${project.build.directory}/classes/metadata"
# Check if this is the .decisionservice module if [ "$MODULE_NAME" = ".decisionservice" ]; then # Special behavior for .decisionservice module: copy metadata from sibling modules echo "Running in .decisionservice module - copying metadata from siblings"
# Get the parent directory (one level up from .decisionservice) PARENT_DIR="${project.basedir}/.."
# Find all sibling modules (directories at the same level as .decisionservice) for sibling_dir in "$PARENT_DIR"/*; do # Skip if not a directory or if it's the .decisionservice directory itself if [ ! -d "$sibling_dir" ] || [ "$(basename "$sibling_dir")" = ".decisionservice" ]; then continue fi
# Check if the sibling has a metadata folder in target/classes METADATA_DIR="$sibling_dir/target/classes/metadata" if [ -d "$METADATA_DIR" ]; then # Copy all JSON files from the sibling's metadata folder for json_file in "$METADATA_DIR"/*.json; do if [ -f "$json_file" ]; then echo "Copying metadata from $(basename "$sibling_dir"): $(basename "$json_file")" cp "$json_file" "${project.build.directory}/classes/metadata/" fi done fi done
echo "Metadata copy complete" else # Default behavior for other modules: generate metadata from .drl files echo "Generating metadata for module: $MODULE_NAME"
# Get git tag for version GIT_TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "1.0.0")
# Output file OUTPUT_FILE="${project.build.directory}/classes/metadata/${project.artifactId}.json"
# Find the .dmo file to extract decision node names DMO_FILE=$(find "${project.basedir}" -name "*.dmo" -type f | head -1)
# Start JSON array echo "[" > "$OUTPUT_FILE"
# Find all .drl files in the module and store in array mapfile -t drl_files < <(find "${project.basedir}" -name "*.drl" -type f | sort)
# Process each file for i in "${!drl_files[@]}"; do drl_file="${drl_files[$i]}"
# Extract rule name from file name (without extension) RULE_NAME=$(basename "$drl_file" .drl)
# Get the parent folder name (e.g., node_1) PARENT_FOLDER=$(basename "$(dirname "$drl_file")")
# Extract decision node name from .dmo file for this folder DECISION_NODE_NAME="" if [ -f "$DMO_FILE" ]; then # Look for the decision node with id matching the parent folder # Use sed for better portability across systems DECISION_NODE_NAME=$(sed -n "s/.*<decision id=\"$PARENT_FOLDER\" name=\"\([^\"]*\)\".*/\1/p" "$DMO_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "") echo "Found decision node: $DECISION_NODE_NAME for folder: $PARENT_FOLDER" fi
# Create the ID by concatenating decision node name and rule name if [ -n "$DECISION_NODE_NAME" ]; then RULE_ID="${DECISION_NODE_NAME}/${RULE_NAME}" else RULE_ID="$RULE_NAME" fi
# Get git metadata for the file GIT_AUTHOR=$(git log -1 --format="%an" -- "$drl_file" 2>/dev/null || echo "Unknown") GIT_CREATED=$(git log --diff-filter=A --format="%ai" -- "$drl_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | sed 's/ /T/' | cut -d' ' -f1 || date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) GIT_MODIFIED=$(git log -1 --format="%ai" -- "$drl_file" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/ /T/' | cut -d' ' -f1 || date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)
# Determine if we need a comma after this entry COMMA="" if [ $i -lt $((${#drl_files[@]} - 1)) ]; then COMMA="," fi
# Generate JSON entry cat >> "$OUTPUT_FILE" << EOF { "id": "$RULE_ID", "name": "$RULE_NAME", "description": "...", "version": "$GIT_TAG", "properties": { "author": "$GIT_AUTHOR", "createdDate": "$GIT_CREATED", "lastModified": "$GIT_MODIFIED" } }$COMMA EOF done
# Close JSON array echo "]" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE" fi
